objectives.text: Recover the chapter’s final seven names.
Decide what Father Noah should do with the recovered names.
The names have been given a place above ground.

stages.description: The sealed stair kept a duty record for every priest, nun, novice, and pilgrim sent below.
The closure record names the first watch. The novitiate roll should account for the people housed beyond the inner door.
The sleeping roll is incomplete. The candidate board should carry the novices assigned to the profession galleries.
The trial roll restores most of the congregation. The chapter record should name the last seven survivors.

stages.task: Return the names to Father Noah
stages.description: The rolls account for all sixty-one people sealed beneath the church. Father Noah can decide where that record belongs, if you let him.
A decision has been made about the record of the sixty-one people below the hill.
